artifact.title: Client
artifact.description: A customer of the construction company who owns one or more projects, receives invoices, and approves or rejects change orders.

fields.description: Unique identifier for the client record.
Full name of the client contact person.
Legal name of the client's organization, if applicable.
Primary email address used to send shareable project links and invoices.
Contact phone number for the client.
Indicates whether the client may log in to the portal using platform authentication to view project information.
Postal address used on informational invoices sent to the client.
Timestamp when the client record was created.
Timestamp when the client record was last modified.
